title: Effects of transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS) associated with balance training in individuals with Parkinson's: Study protocol for a randomized clinical trial
author: Santos, Areas, et al.

steps.title: Statistical analysis
steps.instruction: To demonstrate the data, the results were described as mean ± standard deviation, median and interquartile range and percentage values. To calculate the cost of the dual task, the formula was used: [(TUG DT performance – TUG performance)/ TUG performance * 100 %] [29].

steps.title: Statistical analysis
steps.instruction: Initially, the Shapiro-Wilk test will be performed to assess the normality of the data and the Levene test to assess homogeneity. When the data did not show homogeneity of variances, the Welch test correction will be applied in the main analyses.

steps.title: will be accepted as a no effect size, 0

steps.title: as a strong effect size
steps.instruction: as a strong effect size. The intervention effect will be calculated based on intention-to-treat analysis. Values p < 0.05 were accepted as significant. The software used will be Jamovi 2.3 software (Jamovi project, Sydney, Australia) and Graphpad Prism 9.0 software (Graphpad, California, USA).

description: Data analysis for the protocol is currently ongoing. An example of a Excel data file (pilot study) for the analysis can be found in the Supplemental section..
